name: LendKey Student Loans
description_short: LendKey connects borrowers with community banks and credit unions for student loan refinancing and home improvement loans at competitive rates.
description_long: LendKey operates a lending-as-a-service platform that connects borrowers with community lenders including banks and credit unions. Specializing in student loan refinancing and home improvement loans, LendKey offers competitive rates from local lenders with a streamlined digital application process.
affiliate_program: High conversion rates with tiered payouts for community lender referrals
pros: Connects borrowers with hundreds of community banks and credit unions for student loan refinancing at competitive rates
Unified online application process simplifies applying through multiple lenders
Offers student loan refinancing, private student loans, and home improvement loans
Provides calculators for student loan refinancing and payment planning
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees mentioned
cons: Not a direct lender—rates and terms depend on matched partner institutions
Limited exclusively to student loans and home improvement loans, not traditional personal loans
Only refinances existing loans; does not originate federal student aid
diagnosis: LendKey is a marketplace platform connecting borrowers to partner banks and credit unions. Its core product (student loan refinancing) does not fit any valid CreditDoc category—student loans are a distinct financial product separate from personal loans ($1K-$50K unsecured). Recommend removing from directory or expanding categories to include student loan platforms.
